name: h0_baseline
description: H0: Baseline Inverter Dynamics — straight line, circle direction, speed scaling, radius control

runs.label: H0a: Equal L/R frequencies (C1=C3) -> straight-line motion (no turning bias)
H0b: R-dominant inverter (C3<C1) -> stable circle curving right
H0c: L-dominant inverter (C1<C3, mirror of H0b) -> stable circle curving left, same radius as H0b
H0d: 2x absolute freq (periods halved), same R/L ratio as H0b -> same radius, ~2x speed
H0e: 4x absolute freq (periods quartered), same R/L ratio as H0b -> same radius, ~4x speed
H0f: Wider R/L ratio than H0b (1.50x) -> tighter circle (smaller radius) than H0b
H0g: Widest R/L ratio (2.00x) -> tightest circle (smallest radius)
